channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: 9 R.I.P. sequel coming west in 2026
item.content:encoded:
• Switch

Available both physically and digitally.

Idea Factory International will release otome visual novel sequel 9 R.I.P. sequel for Switch in 2026 in the west, the publisher announced. It will be available both physically and digitally. A limited edition will also be available.

9 R.I.P sequel first launched for Switch on September 25, 2025 in Japan.

Here is an overview of the game, via Idea Factory International:

About

Following the endings of 9 R.I.P., Misa Isshiki finds herself at a crossroads with navigating romantic life and the consequences of her actions during her second year of high school. New challenges await depending on the route taken…

Whether it’s grappling with the fallout of her death, or navigating a relationship with a supernatural being, Misa must come to terms with her decisions to move forward.

Will she continue along the same path, or take another route entirely?

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Back from the Dead – 9 R.I.P. has returned from the grave with a sequel! With 9 full routes of love interests from the previous game, there’s sure to be a man, demon, or spirit for everyone’s tastes.
  • We’re in Heaven – Heavenly Routes are back with a more direct sequel to the previous Heavenly Endings. These stories feature new obstacles to overcome. Make your choices carefully, or they will have consequences for everyone around you… Can you and your love prevail through the challenges of life (and possibly death)?
  • Sugar, Spice, and Everything Nice – Need something more on the romantic side to sweep you off your feet? Godly Routes suit fans who crave a happy and sweet ending, serving as epilogues for each Love Interest’s Godly Ending in the first game.
  • Killer Views – Character designer Yuuya kills with breathtaking visuals that once again manage to bring even the dead back to life.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Western Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/9-rip-sequel-coming-west-in-2026
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Kiln launches April 23
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

PC open beta set for April 9 to 11.

Team-based multiplayer pottery party brawler Kiln will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on April 23, Publisher Xbox Game Studios and developer Double Fine Productions announced. It will also be available via Game Pass. An open beta test will run for PC via Steam from April 9 to 11.

Here is an overview of the game, via Microsoft:

About

Kiln is a pottery power-fantasy that celebrates both Creativity and Destruction: the pleasure that comes from both making beautiful things, and then smashing those things to smithereens. Create your pot, grab your friends, and join a team of colorful spirits who face off against one another in online arenas, where the ceramic creations you sculpt on a pottery wheel become the bodies you bring into battle.

The shape of your pots affect your attributes and your play-style. Will you be big, or small? Wide, or tall? Will you make a plate, a jug, a cup or a bowl?

There are a multitude of different sizes and combinations to discover, each with unique abilities and attacks, along with new and surprising ways to play. Work together to find the best combination of pots and play-styles to break through enemy lines, and collect enough water to douse the flames of the enemy’s kiln—does your team have what it takes to shape and smash your way to victory? As the battlefield becomes strewn with the shattered fragments of friend and foes alike, your brawling skills and some great teamwork will be required to assure victory.

After the battle is won, head to The Wedge to practice your pottery prowess, decorate your pots to make them yours, then share your creations with others (and admire their handiwork, too).

Key Features

  • Create and Destroy Together – Making pots and breaking pots are both better with friends. Hang out, experiment with clay and share what you make, or jump right into multiplayer battles and start swinging!
  • Become a Master Potter – Manipulate realistic clay to craft and decorate in an immersive pottery wheel experience featuring a variety of tools and techniques.


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/kiln-launches-april-23
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: EXODUS ‘Gameplay First Look’ trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Two minutes of new footage.

Archetype Entertainment has released a two-minute “Gameplay First Look” trailer for science-fiction action adventure RPG EXODUS.

The first clip features an early-game combat encounter outside Lyonesse with Jun, Tom, and Elise. The second clip is a traversal sequence on a Lyonesse space tower that highlights the railclaw. And the third highlights exploration inside an ancient Celestial shrine on Khonsu.

EXODUS is due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store in early 2027.

Watch the trailer below.

Gameplay First Look



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/exodus-gameplay-first-look-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: SHINOBI: Art of Vengeance DLC ‘SEGA Villains Stage’ launches April 3
item.content:encoded:
SHINOBI: Art of Vengeance downloadable content “SEGA Villains Stage” will launch on April 3 for $9.99 alongside a free update, publisher SEGA and developer Lizardcube announced.

Here is an overview of the content, via SEGA:

Downloadable Content “SEGA Villains Stage”

Master of the ninja arts Joe Musashi will face his fiercest battles yet as he takes on three legendary SEGA foes: the ruthless giant Death Adder (Golden Axe), the “mad dog” of Shimano Goro Majima (Like a Dragon / Yakuza), and the evil genius Dr. Eggman (Sonic the Hedgehog).

The downloadable content “SEGA Villains Stage” will take players through exciting new stages featuring stunning worlds inspired by beloved SEGA franchises. The downloadable content will include:

  • Three new bosses
  • Five new stages
  • Two new Boss Rush modes
  • Three new ninpo
  • Three new outfits
  • Six new music tracks

The downloadable content “SEGA Villains Stage” is included with purchase of the Digital Deluxe Edition of the game. Players who own the standard edition of the game can get in on the action by purchasing the downloadable content as a standalone item ($9.99 MSRP USD) or as an upgrade pack ($11.99 MSRP USD) when the downloadable content releases.

Free Update

Alongside the downloadable content release on April 3, SHINOBI: Art of Vengeance will also receive a free update patch. The patch will add a “Hardcore Mode” and combat system adjustments, and includes updates to character outlines, map, and tutorial display features.

SHINOBI: Art of Vengeance is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC via Steam.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

DLC “SEGA Villains Stage” Animated Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/shinobi-art-of-vengeance-dlc-sega-villains-stage-launches-april-3
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Vanishing Starlight launches March 26
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5

Side-scrolling Metroidvania action adventure game dated.

Side-scrolling Metroidvania action adventure game Vanishing Starlight will launch for PlayStation 5 and PC via Steam on March 26, publisher Gamepoch and developer Heart Seven announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Gamepoch:

About

Vanishing Starlight is a Metroidvania action adventure game with cyberpunk and Shan Hai Jing mythological elements infused.
Play as a prisoner who lost his memory. Embark on a journey into the stars, retrieve your lost memories, reunite with old day partners and piece together your own story.

Story

Here you are in the World of “Shanhai,” a world of breathtaking beauty and lurking peril. Beneath its vibrant surface lies the cruel dominion of God, forged with an iron fist and woven from lies, where countless beings struggle for survival.

Play as “Salt,” a death row prisoner who lost his memory and trapped in the Gibetuary. Led by a mysterious guide, you escaped that earthly hell and found your partners, only to discover that you all have lost the memories of the past.

Past and present leave no trace with the truth buried deep.

Yet you are determined to make God aware: Light of a faint candle can set the heavens ablaze!

Key Features

  • World of Cyber-Shan Hai Jing – A deep fusion of ancient eastern mythology and cyberpunk aesthetics.
  • Metroidvania Core of Play – Start from nothing and gradually unlock new abilities as you delve deeper. Traverse every inch of this world as you forge new paths and revisit old grounds.
  • Triple Form of Armors – Seamlessly switch between armors with each own weapon, skin and ability focus to adapt in combat.

Digital Deluxe Extra

  • Art Book – A deep dive into the visual development of the Shanhai world.
  • Original Soundtrack – Complete cyber-eastern score, composed exclusively for the game.
  • Two Exclusive Sleepless’ Skins – See your trusted partner in a whole new light.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/vanishing-starlight-launches-march-26
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
